ai_strengths: Proven delivery of high-impact automation projects: CV data extraction tool reducing processing time from 15 minutes to 30 seconds, real-time Gmail inbox monitoring with AI drafting, and scheduled API-driven data pipelines

Azure cloud pathway: AZ-900 certified with AZ-204 and AZ-400 in progress, signalling commitment to cloud-native and DevOps competencies
Hands-on systems integration experience: WhatsApp Business API, SendGrid, ServiceNow, Freshservice, and ERP systems exposure gained through freelance client work
Clear career intent: Currently enrolled in MANCOSA BCom (IT Management) while maintaining production employment — demonstrates structured progression toward formal IT credentials
ai_weaknesses: Employment narrative gap: Recent pivot from digital workflow support roles (Sep 2023–Present) into TIG welding (Jul 2024–Present) alongside ongoing self-employment — recruiter should clarify strategic direction and commitment to technical vs. production track
No formal employment reference history provided: Verify technical project scope and client deliverables directly with him; freelance work lacks third-party validation on CV
